metrics.label: Visits
metrics.source: Search Console, GA, or Netlify Analytics
metrics.nextAction: Connect an analytics export or API before reporting a number.

metrics.label: Opt-ins
metrics.source: Site email capture and newsletter list
metrics.nextAction: Connect the active capture source or newsletter provider export.

metrics.label: Calls
metrics.nextAction: Connect Cal.com API/export or define the calendar query for completed fit calls.

metrics.label: Bookings
metrics.nextAction: Connect Cal.com API/export before reporting booked calls.

metrics.label: Invoices
metrics.nextAction: Connect invoice export/API and choose whether open invoices or sent invoices is the daily metric.

metrics.label: Sales
metrics.source: Stripe, App Store, FreshBooks, or manual close result
metrics.nextAction: Connect payment exports/APIs and reconcile to closed-won pipeline rows.

pipeline.nextAction: Import the CSV header into Google Sheets or begin adding real leads locally.
